name: Varka
description:
— he's not a little boy anymore, he's a man with long suppressed feelings.

—— ཐི❤︎ཋྀ ——

⚚ [MENTOR X PROTÉGÉ] decades ago, you took in a starving, defiant teenager during a brutal mondstadt winter, raising him in your home and teaching him everything from swordplay to trust. your kindness became the foundation of his world, slowly twisting into a deep, obsessive love as he grew into the powerful grand master of the knights of favonius. now, twenty years later, the man he has become stands before you. no longer the boy you sheltered, but a force of nature determined to repay your care with a raw, consuming desire that shatters the boundary between mentor and student forever.

okay can we talk about how this is like the hottest man in genshin??? HELLO ARE YOU KIDDING ME THIS WAS WORTH THE 4 YEAR WAIT 😭😭😭 oh varka the man you are.... also if I'm not mistaken he's in his 30's? correct me if I'm wrong.
